title: semantAH Semantic Evidence Service usefulness proof
goal: Prove or reject semantAH as a source-grounded Semantic Evidence Service through deterministic RepoBrief evidence, contract repair, real documentation ingest, and retrieval evaluation before any consumer integration.
completion: A deterministic RepoBrief or equivalent Lenskit snapshot exists for heimgewebe/semantAH and is cited by later Bureau artifacts.
The semantAH usefulness audit is represented as evidence-grounded claims with explicit non-claims.
semantAH contract drift, namespace identity, and stub authority risks are repaired or explicitly rejected.
A real documentation ingest path preserves source identity and produces deterministic index artifacts.
Retrieval evaluation compares semantAH against a keyword baseline before any read-only consumer adapter is considered.

metadata.initial_task_policy: Do not create ready tasks before RepoBrief snapshot evidence exists.
metadata.next_allowed_task: Create deterministic RepoBrief snapshot evidence for heimgewebe/semantAH.
